Definition: species as named in Bauernfeind et al. 2013 (full name on the first individual; abbreviated thereafter in the print)
Note: abbreviated names are expanded by the R script; taxonomy applied later via ../_keys/Stephan/

Definition: specimen identifier as printed (trailing a/b/c are the table's method/availability markers)
Note: a = StereoInvestigator; b = ImageJ; c = left hemisphere unavailable

Definition: histological section sampling interval in mm
age of the specimen (years) where reported
body mass in g (printed in kg; x1000)
Note: external species estimate (Smith & Jungers 1997); not the project's harmonised Body_weight_current

Definition: population/social group size from the literature
Note: Nunn & van Schaik 2001; Nunn 2002; en-dash where not found

Definition: brain mass in mg (printed in g; x1000)
shrinkage-corrected total brain volume in mm3 (printed in cm3; x1000)
volume of granular insular cortex (left) in mm3 (printed in cm3; x1000)
volume of dysgranular insular cortex (left) in mm3
volume of agranular insular cortex (left) in mm3
volume of frontoinsular cortex (left) in mm3; present only in great apes and humans (VENs)
total left insula volume in mm3 (granular + dysgranular + agranular; + FI where present)

printed units kg / g / cm3 converted to project units g / mg / mm3 (x1000). Table 1 is per-individual LEFT hemisphere; the project's Bauernfeind_2013.csv holds species means, with Pongo abelii + Pongo pygmaeus merged as the mean of the two species' means (n=4 individuals).
Note: Right-hemisphere volumes are the paper's Table 2 (not snapshotted here).
